_machine_translation_note: Machine-quality drafts for clinician review — do NOT ship to paying customers without credentialed veterinary translator review. Includes fields.* namespace (field labels, options, section titles, placeholders) added 2026-04-17. Labels not covered by fields.* fall back to English via i18next defaultValue. Safety strings (safety.*) remain English-locked with visible EN badge per product owner decision 2026-04-11.
